hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this host.
hints.label: Display name shown in the UI. Falls back to the item key if empty.
hints.host: IP address or hostname to ping. If empty, the item key is used as the host.
hints.timeout: Timeout per attempt in seconds. Per-host value overrides the module-level default.
hints.attempt: Number of ping attempts before declaring a host unreachable. Per-host value overrides the module-level default.
hints.alert: Number of consecutive failures before triggering an alert. Per-host value overrides the module-level default.
hints.threads: Number of hosts to ping in parallel.
